rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(213, 232, 212), rgb(31, 47, 30)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44));

div.div:
Legend
Green: owner/input/output or production/final
Blue: research/integration
Yellow: evidence/packet/control gate
Purple: narrative/expression graph control
Red: review/loss/backflow
Dashed: control, sidecar, or feedback relation
